name: flareThenFlicker
description: Phase 1 (ticks 0-79): exponential ramp on all 6 layers, identical to flareThenFade ph1 but held longer. Phase 2 (ticks 80+): per-LED random-target lerp at alpha 0.15, looping indefinitely. Mirrors firmware case 0x04.

tracks._comment: Phase 1 — 80-tick exponential ramp on all 6 layers.
Phase 2 — per-LED flicker, looping forever (sub-timeline with repeat: -1).
